docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCNUTT, ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL DBA BETTER LIVING HOME CARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
